headline: American Eagle's Growth Is Driven by Aerie's Strong Performance
summary: Aerie powers AEO's growth with strong sales, disciplined execution and continued customer engagement momentum.

headline: Macy's Bets on AI & Digital Innovation to Fuel Long-Term Growth
summary: M leans on AI, digital upgrades and fulfillment improvements to strengthen omnichannel growth as online sales become a bigger share of the business.

headline: Tanger Outlets CEO on the state of retail and the consumer
summary: Tanger Outlets CEO Stephen Yalof says despite headwinds from inflation and other macro issues, consumers have continued to show up at stores since the start of the year.
